rows.promotion_consequence: operated continuous assurance service remains unpromoted
rows.reason: W040 has a runnable file-backed CLI runner, but no recurring scheduler, daemon, service endpoint, or operated run queue.
W040 evaluates alert/quarantine rules locally but does not operate an external dispatcher or quarantine service.

rows.promotion_consequence: operated cross-engine differential service, independent diversity, and Stage 2 service dependencies remain blocked
rows.reason: cross-engine evidence remains file-backed and does not run as an operated differential service.

rows.promotion_consequence: retained-history service, pack-grade replay, C5, and release-grade verification remain unpromoted
rows.reason: W040 emits a file-backed retained-history store/query register and replay-correlation index, but no operated retention SLO or pack-grade replay governance service.
